name: 求生匕首（★） | 夜色
descriptionEn: This multi-purpose tactical knife features a serrated edge for ripping through coarse material like bone or fiber, plus a sharp gutting hook. The composite material handle is bolted to the blade with hex nuts. It has been spray-painted with a tape mask pattern in a night ops color scheme. Spray... Pray... Paint... Stab.
descriptionZh: 这把多功能战术匕首，采用骨头或纤维等粗糙材料打造成锯齿刀刃及一个锋利的穿肠钩。复合材料握把上还拴了带有六角螺母的刀片。 这把武器以黑夜配色的纸带图案进行了喷漆。 喷绘... 渲染... 上色... 刺杀。
